text:
Muhahahasare (ムハハハサレ, Muhahahasare) is a bodyguard working for Prince Tubeppa and a Provisional Hunter. Jump Ryu! Vol. 21 - Togashi's notes 

Abilities & Powers

As a Provisional Hunter, Muhahahasare has all the benefits granted by his status as a Hunter. However, these are all temporary, and his Hunter status and license will expire after the voyage to the New Continent. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 34, Chapter 358 

Trivia

Muhahahasare's name, affiliation, and occupation were revealed in one of the characters sheets shown during Togashi's interview for Jump Ryu! Vol. 21.
